title: Guaranteed to fail: Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and the debacle of mortgage finance
search_query: Guaranteed to fail: Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and the debacle of mortgage finance
notes: The financial collapse of Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac in 2008 led to one of the most sweeping government interventions in private financial markets in history. The bailout has already cost American taxpayers close to $150 billion, and substantially more will be needed. The U.S. ec...
